About the Doctor

A Dedication to
Exceptional Recovery

"Physiotherapy is not just about treating pain — it's about transforming lives and restoring the freedom of movement."

Dr. Gowri Pugazh is a distinguished Orthopedic Physiotherapist holding a Masters degree and dual international certifications in Functional Rehabilitation (CPFRT) and Pain Rehabilitation (CPPRT). Her academic excellence was recognized with a Gold Medal from SRM Institute of Science and Technology.

With a compassionate, evidence-based approach, Dr. Gowri specializes in complex musculoskeletal conditions, sports injuries, and post-surgical rehabilitation. Her treatment philosophy combines the latest manual therapy techniques with personalized exercise protocols tailored to each patient's unique recovery journey.

  • Gold Medalist — SRM University
  • Certified Functional Rehab Therapist
  • Orthopedic Specialist — PT MTP
  • Certified Pain Rehab Practitioner
  • Evidence-Based Treatment Protocols
  • Manual Therapy Expert
Clinical Specialities

Comprehensive Orthopedic
Physiotherapy Care

01
🦴

Orthopedic Rehabilitation

Advanced assessment and treatment of musculoskeletal disorders. From spinal conditions to joint dysfunction — comprehensive orthopedic care tailored to your anatomy.

02
⚡

Sports Injury Recovery

Specialized rehabilitation for athletes of all levels. Rapid return-to-sport protocols with performance enhancement through biomechanical analysis and targeted conditioning.

03
🔬

Manual Therapy (CPFRT)

Certified hands-on techniques including joint mobilization, soft tissue therapy, and neural mobilization. Precision manual therapy for lasting structural correction.

04
🧠

Pain Management (CPPRT)

Certified pain rehabilitation addressing chronic and acute pain conditions. Multimodal pain science education combined with therapeutic interventions for sustainable relief.

05
🏥

Post-Surgical Rehabilitation

Structured, phased recovery programs following orthopedic surgeries including joint replacements, ligament repairs, and spinal procedures for optimal outcomes.

06
🌊

Functional Restoration

Return to work and daily activities through functional movement assessment, ergonomic correction, and personalized therapeutic exercise programming.

Why Choose Us

Precision, Science &
Personalised Care

🎯

Evidence-Based Assessment

Every treatment begins with a comprehensive clinical assessment using the latest diagnostic protocols to identify root causes, not just symptoms.

📋

Personalised Treatment Plans

No two patients are alike. Each rehabilitation program is uniquely designed around your specific condition, lifestyle, goals, and recovery timeline.

📈

Measurable Progress Tracking

Regular outcome measurement ensures your recovery stays on track with objective data guiding every progression in your treatment protocol.

🤝

Compassionate Patient Care

A warm, encouraging environment where patients are empowered with knowledge and motivation throughout every stage of their recovery journey.

"Movement is life. My goal is to give every patient the freedom to move, live, and thrive without limitation."
— Dr. Gowri Pugazh, PT MTP
Your Recovery Journey

Four Steps to Complete Recovery

01

Initial Consultation

Comprehensive evaluation of your condition, medical history, and recovery goals via WhatsApp or in-person.

02

Clinical Assessment

Detailed physical examination and diagnostic testing to identify the exact root cause of your condition.

03

Personalised Plan

A structured, goal-oriented rehabilitation program designed specifically for your body and recovery needs.

04

Full Recovery

Progressive treatment with ongoing monitoring until you achieve complete functional restoration and pain-free living.

Patient Experiences

Stories of Transformation

★★★★★
"

I had knee replacement surgery last year and honestly I was scared I'd never walk properly again. Dr. Gowri took so much time to explain everything — what I can do, what I should avoid, and why. Every session felt like she really cared. Within three months I was climbing stairs at home without holding the railing. My daughter couldn't believe it.

SK
Subramanian Krishnamurthy
68 years · Retired school headmaster
Post-knee replacement rehab
★★★★★
"

I play state-level kabaddi and tore my shoulder ligament during a match. My coach said I was done for the season. But Dr. Gowri had a completely different plan. She worked on my strength, my range of motion, everything step by step. Eight weeks later I was back on the mat — and my shoulder actually feels stronger than it did before the injury.

VM
Vignesh Murugesan
24 years · State Kabaddi Player
Shoulder ligament tear rehab
★★★★ ★★
"

For five years I had this horrible lower back pain that made my job as a nurse almost impossible. I tried three different doctors and two physiotherapists before coming to Dr. Gowri. She found the actual problem — something the others completely missed. She is thorough, patient, and very knowledgeable. I still do the exercises she taught me every morning.

LN
Lavanya Natarajan
34 years · Staff Nurse, Government Hospital
Chronic lower back pain
★★★★★
"

My son is 14 and was having terrible knee pain from running track. I was worried it would affect his studies and his sports career. Dr. Gowri was so gentle with him and explained everything in a way a teenager could understand. She gave him simple exercises to do at school too. He finished the district athletics meet last month — no pain at all. We are very grateful.

RV
Rajeswari Venkataraman
42 years · Software engineer (parent)
Paediatric knee pain (son, 14 yrs)
★★★★ ★★
"

I drive an auto for a living, so neck and shoulder pain is just part of life — at least that's what I thought. Dr. Gowri showed me that I don't have to live with the pain. She taught me exercises I can do even between rides. The way she explains things in simple terms without using complicated medical words made a big difference for me.

KP
Karthikeyan Perumal
39 years · Auto-rickshaw driver
Neck & shoulder pain management
★★★★★
"

After my hip fracture surgery, my family was very worried that I wouldn't be able to walk independently again at my age. Dr. Gowri visited consistently, tracked every little improvement, and kept motivating me when I felt low. Now I walk to the temple every Friday on my own. At 74, that means everything to me. She is a blessing to this family.

MS
Meenakshi Sundaram
74 years · Retired homemaker
Post hip-fracture surgery rehab
